body:
sapphic-dice:

One day I’ll be a me I like… I think I’m already there… just figuring out how to build a life that works with the me I am.

Because the life I once planned… only hurts the girl I’ve found.

I’m everything I never even thought I could be… I’m fucking messy and wild and scared… but I’m me.

I’m alive.

And I’ll learn how to live as me.

Live as Wren.

Cause not for a second do I regret being me.
